deepGlow.title: Deep Glow
deepGlow.desc: Deep Glow is an After Effects plugin that creates high-quality, photorealistic glow effects with a focus on performance and ease of use.

magicBulletSuite.title: Magic Bullet Suite
magicBulletSuite.desc: Magic Bullet Looks is an After Effects plugin that delivers professional, cinematic color grading and film-like finishes with a focus on speed, creativity, and intuitive controls.

bcc.title: BCC
bcc.desc: BCC is an After Effects plugin suite that delivers versatile visual effects, advanced transitions, and high-quality post tools with a focus on performance, flexibility, and smooth creative control.

trapcodeSuite.title: Trapcode Suite
trapcodeSuite.desc: Trapcode Suite is a collection of After Effects plugins designed for creating high-quality particle effects, complex motion graphics, and dynamic simulations with precision, performance, and intuitive creative control.

opticalFlares.title: Optical Flares
opticalFlares.desc: Optical Flares is an After Effects plugin for creating realistic, high-quality lens flares and light effects with an intuitive editor and real-time preview.
